text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
One day as I'm walking along the<n>river, I spot
Tamamo Cross.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Hm? What's this poster about?<n>"Running School:
Students Wanted."

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Huh? ...Ohhh, one of them super<n>expensive
schools only rich kids can<n>attend.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
The world's a tough place, huh?<n>Wish they'd
make room for talented<n>poor folk too...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
...Hm? Rain?! Can this day get any<n>worse? I gotta
find cover!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I also want to avoid the rain, so I head<n>toward the
riverbank, where I see...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Oh, hi Tama. I'm trying to hide from<n>the rain. What
about you?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Whaddya think, Oguri?! I'm doing da<n>same thing!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Today's just an absolute disaster.<n>First, I see that
stupid poster, then I<n>get rained on outta nowhere.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Speaking of which... Hey, Oguri. You<n>ever go to one
of those running<n>schools?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Running schools? I'm from the<n>countryside, so we
didn't have any.<n>You?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I... I couldn't. I wanted to train hard<n>and make life a
little more comfortable<n>for me and my family, but...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: But why?! Why can't I go here?!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: I wanna race! I wanna win! Iwanna make loads of money!

text_block_list.name: School Receptionist
text_block_list.text:
That may be, but you still have to pay<n>for tuition.
Besides, with your...<n>stature, I'm not so sure
you'd do<n>well on our test...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me?! My... stature? You<n>haven't even
seen me run yet! ...Ugh.<n>Whatever!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I was turned away at the gate. They<n>shot me
down without even giving me<n>a chance.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Come to think of it, it was rainin' that<n>day too...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Must've been rough... Actually, I've<n>been told
something similar too.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
People scoffed at me for thinking I<n>could go from
running in the country<n>to central races. They said
I'd never<n>be good enough for the Twinkle<n>Series.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
You too, huh? Sorry you had to go<n>through that.
People just assume<n>things about us, but they
don't get us<n>at all.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, but you can't change the flaws<n>you're born
with. Someone once told<n>me that.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Flaws? ...I dunno if I'd call them that.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I mean, they make life a lot harder,<n>that's for sure.
But...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Damn it! Damn it! To hell with<n>schools! Just you
watch!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Sure I'm a shrimp, but I got my body<n>from my
mom and dad. And I'm<n>gonna win with it no
matter what!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
After getting rejected, I swore I'd<n>prove 'em
wrong one day. I'd show<n>'em I could be
Naniwa's top runner.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
And I've been running toward that<n>dream ever
since.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Tama...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Not being blessed doesn't mean<n>you're flawed.
Growin' up poor and<n>scrawny made me who I am
today.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Using everything I was born with is<n>what gives me
strength!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Th-the rain...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Looks like it finally let up. Let's go,<n>Oguri. Race you
back to the dorms!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I'll tear past anything with these legs<n>of mine!
That's why they call me<n>White Lightning!
